channel.title: Political News on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Political News on MinWeb

item.title: What Is the 'Mamdani Act'? Inside the GOP’s New Bill
item.description: Explore the details of the controversial Mamdani Act, a new GOP bill targeting ideological figures and immigration policy, and understand its legal...

item.title: Alaska’s Ranked-Choice Voting Faces New Repeal Effort
item.description: Alaska is heading to the polls again to decide the fate of ranked-choice voting; discover the core arguments behind the push to repeal this electoral system.

item.title: CPAC Crowd Backfires, Cheers for Trump Impeachment
item.description: Witness a surreal moment at CPAC where an enthusiastic crowd accidentally cheered for Trump's impeachment, highlighting the dangers of blind political loyalty.

item.title: Trump’s Pearl Harbor Joke: The Diplomatic Cost of a Quip
item.description: President Trump’s recent Pearl Harbor joke during a high-stakes meeting with Japan risks critical diplomatic ties and undermines vital U.S.-Japan cooperation.
